summary: The fiscal 2022 figure of 434 days was inflated by a COVID-19-era backlog: CCRB mediators were only able to resume in-person mediations in the second half of fiscal 2022, so many pandemic-delayed cases closed that year with unusually long completion times. Once mediation activity normalized, average completion time dropped 79% to 93 days in fiscal 2023 and has stayed in that range since.
